---
title: "About"
---

This website was created as part of the SIB course \*Make Your Research FAIRer with Quarto, GitHub and Zenodo\*.

It demonstrates a reproducible research workflow using:

- Quarto for combining narrative, code and results;
- R for data analysis and visualization;
- Git and GitHub for version control;
- \`renv\` for recording package dependencies;
- GitHub Actions for automated website publishing;
- Zenodo for archiving a release and assigning a DOI.

The example analysis explores trends in baby names in the United States using the \`babynames\` R package.
